info.title: KB Action Group
info.description: Answer a knowledge/policy/how-to question from the indexed document corpus (RAG). The agent calls POST /run with { useCase: "kbSearch", params: { query, topK } }; the Lambda embeds the query with Bedrock Titan embeddings, retrieves the nearest passages from the Postgres pgvector store (fedline.search_kb), and returns a DispatchResult where meta.answer is the grounded answer, meta.citations lists the sources, and data holds the retrieved passages (title, source, score, snippet).

post.summary: Answer a knowledge-base question from the indexed corpus (RAG).
post.description: Runs the kbSearch use case: embeds the query, retrieves the most similar passages from the pgvector knowledge store, and returns a grounded, cited answer. Not user-specific; needs no identifiers.

useCase.description: The KB use case to execute.

query.description: The natural-language question to answer from the knowledge base.

topK.description: Maximum number of passages to retrieve (default 6).

200.description: Grounded knowledge-base answer with retrieved passages.

meta.description: answer (grounded text), citations (sources), query, matched, retrieval.
